name: Duck Gear
description: This model was made to add a 3D effect to a trophy for Prettiest Boat at a cardboard boat Reggatta.
The model features a Pirate Duck in a boxy boat.
Depth was made with various extrude heights.
The model was fabricated using CNC milling Laguna router on 1/4 inch MDF board, with a 90 degree 1 1/4" V bit.
CNC code generated with Vetric software.

name: EEG Board Housing
description: This model was designed for housing circuit boards of a Single-channel EEG device.
The model features slots at the bottom for looping zipties through.
The loops are sized to slide eyeglasses (arm) through.
The project was for Senior design, title BrainFrames.

name: Derail Keychain
description: A keychain scale model of portable train derail.
